title: Authentication bypass in Chat Trigger node n8nUserAuth mode
description: The Chat Trigger node's validateAuth() helper, when configured with the 'n8nUserAuth' authentication mode, only checked whether an 'n8n-auth' cookie was present on the incoming webhook request; it never validated the cookie's authenticity or session. As a result, an unauthenticated attacker could send any non-empty 'n8n-auth' cookie value to the chat webhook endpoint and pass the authentication gate, accessing a chat workflow intended to be restricted to logged-in n8n users.
